Can someone explain to me why Doresain is so polarizing? I feel like half the people I see call him a god carry and the other call him Dorestain.

both sides are memeing

doresain performance varies wildly based on the boss, he is good if he can get kills and sucks otherwise
so god doresain is when he has a lot of little mobs to eat
and doorstain is when he's fighting something with a single giant hp bar
Generally speaking his very hard to use on Alert 5 difficulty
basically hes very inconsistent
Requires premium support + heavy investment in wheel and his dupes to make work
However you have a easier time clearing with other dps given the same setup
His still viable thou

abt characters thais aigis and clem are usually used as keyflare batteries
If you do wanna speed through it though, I definitely recommend picking up both Aged & Epiphany as part of your WoDs
I have two of those characters very helpful
They are both Brown / R Rarity
Likely have some copies of them lying around
And they make it so that you can essentially cast your Posse Skill at least once per each Battle
I put two keyflare regens on helot and mouchette
Since Aged will generate 1000 Keyflare at the end of Battle whereas Epiphany will grant 1000 Keyflare at the start of Exploration
Oh I see I see
Aged / Epiphany are better for that
Because they generate a flat amount
1000 is generally enough to cast a Posse
With some special exceptions like Stages where they raise the Cost by an additional 100 for every Cast

For your standard pulls, you could expand your roster by pulling on either Aequor or Ultra standard banners
Aequor units are decent at carrying you through A1 DTide waves for extra rewards, Ultra offers a bigger selection of meta supports that will prove a lot more useful later

Alternatively, just go straight to pulling for +12 Blade of the Titan and focus on vertical investment for your Mouchette team

You should ultimately do both of those things, but the order is up to you

Would it be worth it to use the standard wheel selects on blade to max it out faster?
you can, since wheel banner is a selector anyway
if you regret your choice just pull the wheel you want
tyty, followup, once you max out a wheel can you still get roll it or it's gone from the random pool?
you can roll it, it gets converted into level up breakthrough materials
which are reasonably rare, you normally only get them from high dtide scores
so not terrible but not great

Is this team fine?, or can i swap someone out to make it better, also is it better i get Doresain's sig wheel or should i pull for Enlightenments?
Generally, it's Character Enlightenments > Weapon Enlightenments
You should also consider swapping out Nautila for another Character
Preferably somebody who can raise Doresain's Damage Output
As this early on into Arc 1 (before Chapter 7), there are rarely ever any Bosses truly capable of wiping your Team out
Preferably a Character with AoE Damage too
So that they can chip the health of Mobs / Elites / Bosses to give Doresain an easier time last hitting them
Multi - Hit is okay
Ideally, you'd want to have Pickman or Clementine
Horla is also great too
